entity_types.name: FoodDish
entity_types.description: A specific type of prepared food, often with variations and historical development.

entity_types.name: Location
entity_types.description: A geographical place, city, region, or country.

entity_types.name: Person
entity_types.description: An individual involved in the history or development of food.

entity_types.name: Document
entity_types.description: A written work, such as a book, article, or historical record.
examples: Etymological Dictionary of the Italian Language

entity_types.name: Event
entity_types.description: A significant occurrence or happening in time.
examples: UNESCO Intangible Cultural Heritage Lists inscription

entity_types.name: Ingredient
entity_types.description: A component used in the preparation of a food dish.

entity_types.name: DishVariant
entity_types.description: A specific variation or style of a food dish, often named or associated with a particular region or characteristic.

relation_groups.name: Creation and Development
relation_groups.description: Relations describing the origin, invention, or evolution of food dishes and related entities.

relations.name: originated_in
relations.detail: describes the geographical origin or place of development of a food dish

relations.name: develops
relations.detail: indicates a person who invented or significantly developed a food dish

relations.name: develops
relations.detail: describes an organization that developed or popularized a food dish

relations.name: uses
relations.detail: specifies an ingredient used in a food dish

relation_groups.name: Documentation and Description
relation_groups.description: Relations concerning the recording, description, or mention of food dishes and their history.

relations.name: documented_in
relations.detail: indicates a document where a food dish is mentioned or described

relations.name: described_by
relations.detail: identifies a person who described a food dish

relations.name: published
relations.detail: indicates a person who published a document

examples.head: pizza
examples.tail: Etymological Dictionary of the Italian Language

examples.head: Pellegrino Artusi
examples.tail: La scienza in cucina e l'arte di mangiar bene

relation_groups.name: Establishment and Operation
relation_groups.description: Relations related to the founding, opening, or operation of organizations, particularly pizzerias.

relations.name: founded
relations.detail: indicates a person who founded an organization

relations.name: opened_in
relations.detail: specifies the location where an organization opened

relations.name: operated_by
relations.detail: identifies a person who operated or ran an organization

relation_groups.name: Recognition and Status
relation_groups.description: Relations describing official recognition, awards, or cultural status of food dishes or practices.

relations.name: granted_status
relations.detail: indicates a food dish receiving an official designation or status

relations.name: recognized_by
relations.detail: identifies an organization that recognizes or certifies a food dish

relation_groups.name: Influence and Spread
relation_groups.description: Relations detailing the expansion, introduction, or influence of food dishes or culinary practices.

relations.name: introduced_to
relations.detail: describes a location where a food dish was introduced

relations.name: spread_to
relations.detail: indicates a location to which a food dish spread

relations.name: influenced_by
relations.detail: describes one food dish being influenced by another

relation_groups.name: Categorization and Characteristics
relation_groups.description: Relations describing the classification, characteristics, or variations of food dishes.

relations.name: has_variant
relations.description: indicates a specific variation or style of a broader food dish
relations.detail: describes a specific variation or style of a broader food dish

relations.name: is_style_of
relations.description: associates a dish variant with a particular geographical style or origin
relations.detail: associates a dish variant with a particular geographical style or origin
